JavaScript is required on this site. Toggle navigation Xanthomonas euvesicatoria (XANTEV) Menu Overview → Overview Code created in: 2022-11-08 Basic information EPPO Code: XANTEV Preferred name: Xanthomonas euvesicatoria Authority: Jones et al. Propose photo Taxonomy Kingdom Bacteria      (
      1BACTK      ) Phylum Proteobacteria      (
      1PROBP      ) Class Gammaproteobacteria      (
      1GAMBC      ) Order Lysobacterales      (
      1LYSOO      ) Family Lysobacteraceae      (
      1LYSOF      ) Genus Xanthomonas      (
      1XANTG      ) Species Xanthomonas euvesicatoria      (
      XANTEV      )

seed.symptoms: Small water-soaked lesions on leaves turning necrotic with yellow halos; raised, scabby spots on fruit; defoliation.
seed.causes: Bacterium Xanthomonas euvesicatoria; spread by rain splash, contaminated seed, and infected transplants.
seed.treatment: Copper hydroxide sprays; avoid working in wet fields; remove infected plant debris.
seed.prevention: Use certified disease-free seed; copper seed treatments; resistant varieties; crop rotation.
